name: Millet Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine yogurt and butter in a saucepan, heating slowly to melt the butter.
2. Dissolve yeast and honey in warm water; add yogurt mixture and blend well.
3. Beat in eggs; gradually add flours and beat until smooth.
4. Pour batter into a well-oiled 4-inch x 8-inch loaf pan and let rise for 45 minutes.
5. Bake at 375°F for 40-45 minutes or until done. Cool before cutting.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "Recipes for Special Dietary Needs" tri-fold Reprinted by permission of Arrowhead Mills, Inc. Electronic format courtesy of: Karen Mintzias
